description: A prospective student calls to check the status of their undergraduate application.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the student's application using their name and date of birth.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the applicant's record.

nodes.task_description: Check the current status of the application in the student information system (SIS).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the application status is 'Under Review'.

nodes.task_description: Inform the student of their application status and provide the expected decision date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the status and timeline.
